source_inputs.summary: Customers can apply one promo code during checkout and receive clear validation messages for invalid states.

requirements.summary: Valid promo code SAVE10 applies 10 percent discount before payment.
acceptance_criteria: Payable total reflects discount before payment.

requirements.summary: Invalid promo states show clear errors and do not alter payable total.
acceptance_criteria: Expired, used, and empty promo submissions show specific messages.

requirements.summary: Removing an applied promo code restores original total.
acceptance_criteria: Discount row is removed and payable total returns to original amount.

assumptions.text: Cart total 100.00 is valid test data for deterministic discount assertions.

open_questions.text: Promo configuration API endpoint is not documented.

in_scope: Checkout promo apply, reject, empty input, and removal behavior
out_of_scope: Final payment capture and promotion administration UI

risk_analysis.description: Promo configuration API is not documented, which may block automation fixture setup.
risk_analysis.mitigation: Use preconfigured promo codes and record API gap for automation handoff.

test_strategy.priority_model: Prioritize checkout money-impacting flows as P1 and UI restoration as P2.
test_strategy.coverage_target: Each requirement maps to at least one test case or explicit exclusion.
test_strategy.execution_approach: Run initial Untested cases in payment sandbox with deterministic cart data.

test_plan.objective: Validate promo code application and rejection behavior before checkout payment.
test_plan.environment: Retail Web staging with payment provider sandbox.
entry_criteria: Checkout page is deployed to staging.
Promo test codes SAVE10, SPRINGOLD, and ONCEONLY are configured.
exit_criteria: All P1 planned cases are reviewed and ready for qa-executor.
Open questions are accepted or resolved.
test_plan.schedule_notes: Execute in the next checkout regression cycle.

test_cases.summary: Verify discount is applied before payment.
test_cases.pre_conditions: Cart has eligible item and user is on checkout page.
test_cases.expected_result: Order summary shows 10 percent discount and payable total 90.00.

test_cases.summary: Verify expired code does not alter total.
test_cases.pre_conditions: Cart has eligible item and user is on checkout page.
test_cases.expected_result: Error Promo code has expired appears and payable total remains 100.00.
test_cases.notes: Automation script exists but is not reviewed or approved yet.

test_cases.summary: Verify empty submit shows validation and keeps total unchanged.
test_cases.pre_conditions: Cart has eligible item and promo input is visible.
test_cases.expected_result: Error Enter a promo code appears and payable total remains 100.00.
test_cases.notes: Edge case likely covered by existing form validation suite.

test_cases.summary: Verify removing promo restores original total and UI state.
test_steps: Review discount row and payable total.
test_cases.expected_result: Discount row disappears and payable total returns to 100.00.
test_cases.notes: Manual-only until UI selector names are confirmed.

coverage_map.notes: Already used promo case should be added when account fixture is confirmed.

qa_executor.environment: Retail Web staging with payment provider sandbox.
gaps: Already used promo account fixture is not confirmed.
qa_executor.summary: Initial run contract for checkout promo planned cases.

gaps: Promo configuration API endpoint is not documented.
qa_automation.summary: Automation candidates for valid promo creation and expired/empty promo automation review.

constraints: Report should reference planning sections instead of duplicating full case text.
gaps: REQ-002 is partial until already used promo case is added or excluded.
qa_reporter.summary: Reporter context for planned checkout promo coverage and risks.

review_history.issue: Add already used promo case when account fixture is available.
review_history.expected_change: Add coverage for promo code ONCEONLY or record fixture gap.
review_history.resolution: Recorded partial coverage and fixture gap; test case to be added after fixture confirmation.

changelog.summary: Created initial planning state with test plan, test cases, coverage map, and downstream contracts.
